asset.title: L5 Large Range
asset.purpose: Silent workflow preview generated from app captures or trace replays. Judge whether it communicates the workflow and gate clearly.

judge.summary: A clean, step-by-step conceptual animation demonstrating cell-level locking and versioned writes within a 5-row window for large ranges.

featureClarity.evidence: Clearly demonstrates the 5-row window loading, locking, reading, writing, and releasing flow.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Shows the entire sequence from initial state to lock, edit, commit, and release.

visualDesign.evidence: High-contrast dark mode with clean typography and smooth transitions.

consistency.evidence: Aligns well with the versioned spreadsheet cell concept.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Feels more like a polished conceptual diagram/simulation than a live product capture.

legibility.evidence: Text and labels are highly readable even at smaller resolutions.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Highly relevant for explaining concurrency and scoping to technical stakeholders.

productionHonesty.evidence: Accurately represents the step-by-step protocol flow without claiming to be a live UI.

observedEvidence: Read and write operations with versioning
judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Visualizing how agents safely lock, read, and commit versioned updates within a localized 5-row window on large sheets.
